data.body: STATUS (final): ALL 10/10 children CLOSED. This session closed the remaining 5: 95dc (supply-chain CI: CodeQL + gating pip-audit — signed PASS), 3a10 (schema-derived TypedDicts + drift gate — signed PASS), 830d (api-stability doc — signed PASS), d063 (scale-envelope doc w/ measured numbers — signed PASS), 3bf6 (README Quickstart — signed PASS). Plan-review claim gate was intermittently rate-limited (429/INDETERMINATE); resolved by ~8-min spacing between attempts (no --force used; all 5 earned real PASS attestations). b593 remains closed-but-uncertified (bug dash-lure-slag, completion-verifier rejects a top-level JSON array); per decision we ACCEPT an UNSIGNED epic close and leave dash-lure-slag as tracked follow-up (discovered_from this epic). Landing: multi-story -> Gerrit feature branch per CONTRIBUTING §4.
